name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Deep Switch
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Problem / motivation**
Is your request related to a problem? e.g. "I'm frustrated when..."

**Proposed solution**
A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Presets**: If proposing a new provider preset, please share the API docs link.
**Translations**: If proposing new language support, indicate whether you can maintain it.
